matches.progressionLine: As it stands, this win keeps Croatia sweating for the last third-place spot.

commentary.title: GOAL!
commentary.text: Mexico 2-1 Saudi Arabia. Giménez gets his second, turning in Pineda's low cross at the near post. The Azteca erupts.
Saudi Arabia are growing into this. Al-Dawsari drifts inside and curls one just over — a warning to the hosts.

commentary.title: GOAL!
commentary.text: 1-1. Al-Dawsari levels from the spot after a clumsy challenge by Álvarez, sending Ochoa the wrong way.

matches.progressionLine: Australia go through as it stands; a South Africa goal would reopen it.

news.title: Mexico hold off Saudi Arabia in Azteca opener
news.summary: Santiago Giménez's brace settles a nervy hosts' opener as the 2026 World Cup gets under way.

news.title: Argentina cruise as Messi pulls the strings
news.summary: Holders Argentina look ominous after a comfortable win in New Jersey.

news.title: Third-place race: who's still in the hunt?
news.summary: With the final group games to come, the eight best third-placed spots are wide open.
